ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in lbs */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Player's experience in professional leagues */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the player */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the player's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home base */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head coach of the team */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the coach */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the coach */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the coach */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's profile picture */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the coach */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the coach holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team participating in the game */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team participating in the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "score_team1" INTEGER /* Score for the first team */,
  "score_team2" INTEGER /* Score for the second team */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the team is playing at home or away */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date for the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., Active, Recovered) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment being provided for the injury */,
  "recovery_progress" TEXT /* Progress of the player's recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player in the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team in the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount specified in the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Free Agent, Draft Pick) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., Active, Expired) */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scouting report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being scouted */,
  "scout_name" TEXT /* Name of the scout who made the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments and observations from the scout */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position the player is being scouted for */,
  "player_potential" TEXT /* Assessment of the player's potential */,
  "player_skills" TEXT /* Player's skills */,
  "player_weaknesses" TEXT /* Player's weaknesses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchical level of the role for access control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Performance, Leadership) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
